name: elevenlabs
description: Browse voices and models, check subscription usage, and synthesize speech with the ElevenLabs API

envVars.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY
envVars.description: ElevenLabs API key from app settings

tools.name: List Voices
tools.description: List and search the voices available to the account

search.description: Filter voices by name, description, labels, or category

category.description: Filter by category: premade, cloned, generated, or professional

next_page_token.description: Page token from a previous list call

historicalSummary.omitted: voice settings, previews, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Voice
tools.description: Get details about a specific voice

voice_id.description: ID of the voice to fetch

tools.name: List Models
tools.description: List the speech models available to the account

tools.name: Get Subscription
tools.description: Get subscription tier, character usage, and limits for the account

tools.name: Text to Speech
tools.description: Convert text to speech with a chosen voice; the response is binary audio (not JSON), so route the output to a file or player rather than parsing it

voice_id.description: ID of the voice to use (from List Voices)

prompts.title: Browse voices
prompts.prompt: List my available ElevenLabs voices and summarize them by category.

prompts.title: Check character usage
prompts.prompt: Check my ElevenLabs subscription and tell me how much of my character quota is left.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: ElevenLabs API Setup

steps.title: Create an ElevenLabs account
steps.description: Go to https://elevenlabs.io and sign up or sign in. The free tier includes a monthly character allowance suitable for testing.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: Open https://elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys and click 'Create API Key'. You can restrict the key to specific permissions (e.g. text-to-speech, voices read).

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Copy the key and add it to your .env file as ELEVENLABS_API_KEY=...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the Get Subscription tool to confirm the key works and see your character quota.

notes: Authentication uses the xi-api-key header, not Authorization
Text to Speech returns raw binary audio (application/octet-stream), not JSON — treat the response as a file
Speech synthesis consumes characters from your plan quota; overages depend on your subscription tier
